# Law Office of Marc S. Kohnen

> Marc S. Kohnen is a San Diego criminal defense and DUI attorney. Since founding his firm in 2008 he has won jury-trial NOT GUILTY verdicts in cases from felony first-degree murder to misdemeanor DUI, and his cases have been covered by CNN, The Washington Post, the Wall Street Journal and every San Diego TV station. Free, confidential consultations: (619) 398-2500, 425 Tenth Ave, San Diego, CA 92101.

Law Office of Marc S. Kohnen — San Diego criminal defense attorney.
- Address: 425 Tenth Ave, San Diego, CA 92101 (Downtown San Diego, one block from the Gaslamp Quarter)
- Phone: (619) 398-2500 · Email: marc@msklawyer.com · Available 24/7
- Founded 2008; free, confidential consultations
- Licensed by the State Bar of California, #255303 (admitted 2008)
- 75+ client reviews on Yelp; Super Lawyers Rising Stars selectee (2017–2018)
- Education: University of Vermont (1999); Thomas Jefferson School of Law (2006)
- Jury-trial NOT GUILTY verdicts from felony first-degree murder down to misdemeanor DUI
- Cases covered by CNN, HLN, MSNBC, TMZ, The Washington Post, Wall Street Journal, USA Today and every San Diego TV station
- Defends state cases across San Diego, Los Angeles, San Francisco, San Bernardino and Riverside Counties, plus federal cases

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://msklawyer.com/): Looking for a trusted criminal defense attorney in San Diego, CA? Marc Kohnen, an experienced criminal defense lawyer in San Diego, fights to protect your rights.
- [Meet Marc Kohnen](https://msklawyer.com/meet-marc/): Bio, credentials, education and media recognition
- [Case Results](https://msklawyer.com/result/): Real outcomes — dismissals, acquittals and reductions, organized by charge type
- [In the News](https://msklawyer.com/in-the-news/): Press clippings and TV news footage of Marc's cases (27 clippings, 47 broadcast videos)
- [The Robert Branch Acquittal](https://msklawyer.com/the-branch-case/): Anatomy of a high-profile NOT GUILTY verdict (June 2017)
- [FAQ](https://msklawyer.com/faq/): Plain-language answers to the questions every defendant asks
- [Contact](https://msklawyer.com/contact-marc/): Free consultation — phone, email or form

## Practice Areas

- [Criminal Defense](https://msklawyer.com/san-diego-criminal-defense-lawyer/): Every charge, misdemeanor to felony — a defense built around your case, your record and your future.
- [DUI & DWI](https://msklawyer.com/san-diego-dui-attorney/): Field-sobriety challenges, DMV license hearings and hard negotiation to limit the impact on your life.
- [Drug Crimes](https://msklawyer.com/san-diego-criminal-defense-lawyer/drug-crime-attorney/): Possession to trafficking — a strategy built to protect your record and your future.
- [Federal Crimes](https://msklawyer.com/san-diego-federal-criminal-defense-attorney/): Federal exposure demands federal experience — indictments, grand juries and U.S. Attorney negotiations.
- [Diversion Programs](https://msklawyer.com/san-diego-diversion-programs-attorney/): Charges dismissed without a conviction — misdemeanor, mental health, military and drug diversion.
- [White Collar](https://msklawyer.com/white-collar/): Fraud, embezzlement and federal exposure, handled with discretion and precision.
- [Homicide](https://msklawyer.com/homicide/): The highest stakes demand the most relentless, meticulous defense.
- [Sex Crimes](https://msklawyer.com/sex-crimes/): Sensitive, private and tenacious representation when your reputation is on the line.
- [Assault](https://msklawyer.com/assault/): Aggressive defense against assault and battery allegations, simple to aggravated.
- [Domestic Violence](https://msklawyer.com/domestic-violence/): Protecting your rights, your family and your freedom.
- [Violent Crimes](https://msklawyer.com/violent-crimes/): Robbery, weapons allegations and strike offenses — defense for the hardest cases.
- [Theft Crimes](https://msklawyer.com/theft/): Petty theft to grand theft — hundreds of dismissals won.
- [Weapons Crimes](https://msklawyer.com/weapons-crimes/): Firearms and weapons allegations in a state with unforgiving gun laws.
- [Child Abuse](https://msklawyer.com/child-abuse/): Emotionally-charged allegations that demand a careful, meticulous defense.
- [Child Endangerment](https://msklawyer.com/child-endangerment/): PC §273a charges — protecting parents from prosecution overreach.
- [Juvenile Crimes](https://msklawyer.com/juvenile-crimes/): Protecting young clients — and the futures ahead of them.
- [Hit & Run](https://msklawyer.com/hit-run/): VC §20001/§20002 — including a NOT GUILTY verdict at trial.

## Specific Charges

- [Drug Distribution](https://msklawyer.com/san-diego-criminal-defense-lawyer/drug-crime-attorney/drug-distribution-attorney/): Sales, transportation and trafficking allegations, state and federal.
- [Drug Possession](https://msklawyer.com/san-diego-criminal-defense-lawyer/drug-possession-attorney/): Simple possession through possession-for-sale — fighting the charge and the record.
- [Outstanding Warrants](https://msklawyer.com/san-diego-criminal-defense-lawyer/outstanding-warrants-attorney/): Clearing bench and arrest warrants before they clear you out of a job or a home.
- [Importation of a Controlled Substance](https://msklawyer.com/san-diego-federal-criminal-defense-attorney/importation-of-a-controlled-substance/): Border-crossing drug charges at San Ysidro and Otay Mesa — 21 U.S.C. §952 federal defense.
- [Misdemeanor Diversion](https://msklawyer.com/san-diego-diversion-programs-attorney/misdemeanor-diversion/): Judicial diversion under PC §1001.95 — earn a dismissal even over the prosecutor's objection.
- [Mental Health Diversion](https://msklawyer.com/san-diego-diversion-programs-attorney/mental-health-diversion/): PC §1001.36 treatment instead of trial — sealing the arrest when the program is completed.
- [Military Diversion](https://msklawyer.com/san-diego-diversion-programs-attorney/military-diversion/): PC §1001.80 for veterans and active-duty service members — treatment tied to service-related trauma.
- [Drug Diversion](https://msklawyer.com/san-diego-diversion-programs-attorney/drug-diversion/): PC §1000 pretrial diversion for simple-possession charges — complete treatment, case dismissed.
- [Identity Theft](https://msklawyer.com/white-collar/identity-theft/): PC §530.5 allegations — from mistaken identity to complex fraud cases.
- [Murder](https://msklawyer.com/homicide/murder/): First and second degree murder defense — including a NOT GUILTY verdict at trial.
- [Manslaughter](https://msklawyer.com/homicide/manslaughter/): Voluntary and involuntary manslaughter charges defended aggressively.
- [Vehicular Manslaughter](https://msklawyer.com/homicide/vehicular-manslaughter/): Accidents charged as crimes — reconstructing what really happened.
- [Child Molestation](https://msklawyer.com/sex-crimes/child-molestation/): False accusations destroy lives — a defense that protects yours.
- [Child Pornography](https://msklawyer.com/sex-crimes/child-pornography/): State and federal charges with severe exposure — discreet, technical defense.
- [Indecent Exposure](https://msklawyer.com/sex-crimes/indecent-exposure/): PC §314 charges and the registration consequences that follow them.
- [Grand Theft](https://msklawyer.com/theft/grand-theft/): PC §487 felony theft allegations, negotiated down or dismissed.
- [Robbery](https://msklawyer.com/theft/robbery/): PC §211 strike offenses defended with everything on the line.
